characters.name: Blue
characters.description: Blueis the 90s spokescandy who was elected for a new color. Blue is an anthropomorphic M&M with black eyes, thick black eyebrows, milk chocolate filling, an almond core and light blue skin. Prior to 2022, he had peach skin, like the other spokescandies. For attire, he wears a blue shell, white gloves, and sneakers. Along with Yellow, he has also been the tallest M&M. Blue is suave, cool, and narcissistic. He shares some similarities with Red in that respect, but unlike him Blue manages to remain calm and unbothered. Due to this characterization, in many promotions he is seen sporting a pair of shades, or engaging in activities like playing the saxophone or basketball. Blue is suave, cool, and narcissistic. He shares some similarities with Red in that respect, but unlike him Blue manages to remain calm and unbothered. Due to this characterization, in many promotions he is seen sporting a pair of shades, or engaging in activities like playing the saxophone or basketball.

characters.name: Fiyero
characters.description: Fiyero Tigelaaris a character in the non-canonicalWicked: The Life and Times of the Wicked Witch of the West. He is aVinkuusstudent at Shiz University. He's betrothed to another Winkie,Sarima, whom he later marries and has three kids with. He is described as a dark-skinned man with diamond-shaped tattoos in the novel, but isn't portrayed that way in the musical. He becomes the lover ofElphaba, but is eventually transformed into aScarecrowin themusical show, although in the novel it is more likely that he was killed by the wizard's secret police.

characters.description: Dorothy inThe Wonderful Galaxy of Ozhas something called the 'super balloon suit', in which it inflates and allows her to float, slow down falls and sometimes bounce.

characters.name: Green
characters.description: Green(formerlyMs. Green) is the spokescandy for multiple M&M's flavors, and debuted in the commercial "Green's Arrival" on January 12th, 1997. She was the first female spokescandy character. Green is an anthropomorphic M&M with black eyes, defined black eyelashes, dark green lipstick, and a light green texture. She also has small buttons on her white gloves, which she has had since her debut. Prior to 2022, her design had not changed since her debut. Green had peach skin, and sported a pair of white, heeled go-go boots with silver buckles, shped like the M&M's "M" logo. After her 2022 redesign, she now wears tennis shoes and has pale green skin as opposed to the peach skin she had before. Ms. Green is an outward character, and always has something to say. Usually out to impress, she is highly self-aware, which keeps her looking the best she can. Never seen far from the boys, Ms. Green is slightly bothered by their lack of confidence. She often steals the spotlight due to their attentiveness.
characters.personality_section: Ms. Green is an outward character, and always has something to say. Usually out to impress, she is highly self-aware, which keeps her looking the best she can. characters.name: Darby O'Gill
characters.description: Darbyis the main protagonist of theVeggieTalesspecialThe Wonderful Wizard of Ha's, based onThe Wonderful Wizard of Oz. He is a male analog ofDorothy Gale, and played by Junior Asparagus, voiced byLisa Vischer. Darby O'Gill is the title character of a 20th-century Irish novel. The Veggietales character is only called Darby, but the name of his family estate is O'Gill. The avoidance of saying his full name is likely due to the fact thatWalt Disney Picturesowns the film rights to the novel.

characters.name: Red
characters.description: Redis a spokescandy for multiple M&M's flavors. He is an anthropomorphic M&M created with the IQ of a genius and physical prowess (the best of both worlds). He is best friends with Yellow, whom he often bosses around and gets into trouble with. The duo have been the main M&Ms spokescandies since 1996. He represents the original Milk Chocolate flavor of M&M's, but has also represented Crispy, Dark and White Chocolate, Peanut Butter, Birthday Cake, Crunchy Mint, Raspberry and Espresso. Red is an expressive extrovert, and he would like to win always. He is really picky and cynical, which can lead to quick remarks. His attitude and mouth often lands him into humiliating or dangerous situations. Red is an anthropomorphic M&M with black eyes, thick black eyebrows, milk chocolate filling, and light red skin. Prior to 2022, he had peach skin, like the other spokescandies. For attire, he wears a red shell. He also wears white gloves with fabric cuffs and sneakers, white shoes with fabric straps, and cuffs. Red is witty, sarcastic, narcissistic, impatient, greedy, selfish, and cynical. He usually works for his own interests, sometimes even neglecting his best friend Yellow or fellow spokescandies in the process. He is often seen bossing Yellow around or making him do all the work. His outspoken nature often lands him in trouble, especially moreso than the other M&Ms characters. He greatly enjoys his celebrity status, and attributes his fame to his "rizz", "smarts" and "humility". He prefers to be the center of attention: for example in a talk show appearance in a 1997 commercial, he gets annoyed when he is upstaged by Green. While in a Christmas commercial advertising the custom "My M&Ms", he is annoyed at a Christmas party when the guests are more interested in the custom M&Ms than him. He was also very jealous of Blue when he first made his debut, due to his popularity surrounding him being the new M&Ms color at the time. On multiple occasions, he was seen holding his breath so his complexion would turn blue, in an attempt to pose as a new blue M&M. Occasionally he is portrayed as a hopeless romantic; in the 2013 commercial "Devour" Brown sets him up on a "date" with a woman, but she really only wants to eat him. Meanwhile, in the "Love Ballad" commercial that same year, he passionately sings "I'd Do Anything For Love" by Meat Loaf, only for his female love interests to try and eat him. He is shown to be jealous of Yellow in the 1996 commercial "Love Hurts", where his best friend becomes the center of an attractive woman's attention.

characters.name: Yellow
characters.description: Yellowis the peanut spokescandy with a roasted peanut inside. He is the closest and best friend withRed. He is a little clueless and gullible, but has a heart of gold and gets along with nearly everyone. Yellow is an anthropomorphic M&M with black eyes, thick black eyebrows, milk chocolate filling, a peanut core, and light yellow skin. Prior to 2022, he had peach skin, like the rest of the M&M's cast. He is tall and has a more oblong shape compared to the round/flat M&M's, as he is a Peanut M&M. Yellow wears a yellow shell, white gloves, and white high top sneakers. Yellow is clueless, gullible, slow-witted, good natured, and friendly. His gullibility can be a source of annoyance for his best friend Red. Red sometimes manipulates him and bosses him around, but Yellow happily supports his friend every step of the way. Red has a knack for landing the duo in trouble, but Yellow has much better luck due to his positive nature. Yellow is clueless, gullible, slow-witted, good natured, and friendly. His gullibility can be a source of annoyance for his best friend Red. Red sometimes manipulates him and bosses him around, but Yellow happily supports his friend every step of the way. Red has a knack for landing the duo in trouble, but Yellow has much better luck due to his positive nature. He is often clueless or interprets things too literally, like in the episode "Fans", when Red tells him to alert all their fans that Crispy M&Ms are back, he does so to actual cooling fans.
